name: Sour Cream Coffee Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the sugar and butter until light and fluffy.
2. Add egg yolks one at a time, mixing well after each addition. Stir in the sour cream until combined.
3. In a separate bowl, beat the egg whites until stiff peaks form.
4. Gradually fold the beaten egg whites into the butter mixture until just incorporated.
5. Sift together the flour, baking powder, and baking soda. Add this dry mixture to the batter in three additions, mixing gently after each addition.
6. Stir in the chopped nuts and cinnamon.
7. Pour the batter into a greased and floured Bundt pan.
8. Sprinkle the topping of sugar, additional cinnamon, and nuts evenly over the top of the batter.
9. Dot the remaining butter on top.
10. Bake at 325 degrees Fahrenheit for 1 hour. Allow to cool in the pan for 15 minutes before turning out onto a wire rack.
